---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new model, method, or feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What model or method would you like supported?**
E.g., "Support for Segment Anything Model (SAM) end-to-end" or "Add ScoreCAM method"

**Use case**
Describe how you would use this feature.

**Additional context**
Links to papers, existing implementations, or related issues.
